category_sources: Official GNU page says GNU Enscript converts ASCII files to PostScript, HTML, or RTF with syntax highlighting: https://www.gnu.org/software/enscript/
source_facts.description says Convert text to Postscript, HTML, or RTF, with syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page refers to GNU Enscript: https://www.gnu.org/software/enscript/
docs_sources: Official GNU page is the best official documentation surface and points users to installed docs and man pages: https://www.gnu.org/software/enscript/.
repo_sources: Official GNU page says Enscript development sources are stored in git on Savannah and gives git clone git://git.savannah.gnu.org/enscript.git; canonical HTTPS Savannah Git URL is https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/enscript.git.
tags_sources: Official GNU page says Enscript converts ASCII files to PostScript, HTML, or RTF and includes language-sensitive code highlighting: https://www.gnu.org/software/enscript/.
